channel.title: Maine Judicial Branch Court Alerts & Closings
channel.description: Definition-list (dt/dd) of court closures and alerts with no per-item links; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

item.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Court Alerts & Closings
item.description:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + In preparation for the launch of Maine eCourts and eFiling in Region 7 courts, the Calais District Court will be closed all day to the public beginning Monday, July 13th through Friday, July 24th. Monday, July 27th through Friday, July 31st, the court will be closed in the mornings, from 8am to noon for Administrative Week. Removed: - In preparation for the launch of Maine eCourts and eFiling in Region 7 courts, the Calais District Court will be closed all day to the public beginning Monday, July 20th through Friday, July 24th. Monday, July 27th through Friday, July 31st, the court will be closed in the mornings, from 8am to noon for Administrative Week.

item.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Court Alerts & Closings
item.description:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + Oxford County Superior Court - South Paris + Beginning on Thursday, July 16th at 2:00 p.m., the Oxford County Superior Court is closed for the remainder of the day due to a power outage. + South Paris District Court + Beginning on Thursday, July 16th at 2:00 p.m., the South Paris District Court is closed for the remainder of the day due to a power outage.

item.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Court Alerts & Closings
item.description:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Removed: - Oxford County Superior Court - South Paris - Beginning on Thursday, July 16th at 2:00 p.m., the Oxford County Superior Court is closed for the remainder of the day due to a power outage. - South Paris District Court - Beginning on Thursday, July 16th at 2:00 p.m., the South Paris District Court is closed for the remainder of the day due to a power outage.
